# Synthetic test assets for ForensicEngine validation
#
# `sample.jpg` and `sample_forged.jpg` are generated by
# `utils/generate_test_assets.py`. They are **not** real identity documents.
#
# Purpose:
# - Provide a repeatable authentic JPEG (quality 95) with printed-style fields
# - Provide a forged variant where the DOB year is overpainted (1990 → 1985)
#   using a foreign low-quality JPEG patch so ELA / noise checks light up
# - Let Error Level Analysis (ELA) and noise-variance checks demonstrate a
#   measurable discrepancy in the edited region
#
# Companion file:
# - `forge_meta.json` — pixel box of the forged year region for tests
#
# Regenerate with:
#   py -m utils.generate_test_assets
#
# Do not use these images for any purpose other than automated testing.
